name: Meteor Rush - Monochroid
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>流星連打</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メテオラッシュ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－シロクロイド
desc: During the Battle Phase, if 5 or more attacks have been declared this turn (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Meteor Rush - Monochroid" once per turn. If this card battles, it gains 1000 ATK for each attack declared this turn, during the Damage Step only.
mnst_eff: During the Battle Phase, if 5 or more attacks have been declared this turn (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Meteor Rush - Monochroid" once per turn. If this card battles, it gains 1000 ATK for each attack declared this turn, during the Damage Step only.
eff: During the Battle Phase, if 5 or more attacks have been declared this turn (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
